requiredAdapters: international outlet adapter (Type A/C for return)
technologyProfile.workRequirements: Fast WiFi (6GHz capable), video conferencing setup for morning calls to India timezone

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Requested turban stand in room. Preferred high-floor suite with eastern exposure for morning light. Brought personal meditation cushion. Wife Priya accompanied; she prefers sparkling water and has a nut allergy.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Morning: athletic wear for running. Evening: formal Indian dress (kurta) for dinner. Smart casual business wear for gallery visits.
stayHistory.diningChoices: Sought out Indian vegetarian fine dining. Priya visited spa for traditional massage twice.
stayHistory.activities: Early morning runs in Hyde Park (6 days). Private yoga session with instructor. Visited Saatchi Gallery and Gagosian Gallery.
stayHistory.techUsage: Used hotel's business center for video calls to Mumbai (6 AM–7 AM daily). Charged devices nightly.
stayHistory.highlight: Particularly moved by Maria's Hindi greeting and Diwali-themed welcome arrangement; left a personal note of thanks

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Strict vegetarian — no eggs. Requested yoga mat morning setup at 6 AM daily. Very private; explicitly asked for no turndown intrusion. Business meetings in room; required reliable AV setup.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Business casual for day meetings. Evening traditional wear. Priya wore lightweight linen throughout.
stayHistory.diningChoices: Fine dining Indian vegetarian restaurant twice. Private room dining preferred.
stayHistory.activities: Daily 6 AM yoga practice. Private Buddhist temple tour (half day). Business strategy meetings in suite.
stayHistory.techUsage: Heavy Zoom usage (6–7 AM IST). Requested additional USB-C chargers. Used streaming for morning news briefing.
stayHistory.highlight: Arranged private dawn riverboat excursion; Mr. Sharma wrote glowing review citing Maria by name

upcomingReservation.specialRequests: Request suite with view of garden and nature. Early check-in if available. Yoga mat and meditation space. Video conferencing capability for early morning India calls.

signals.detail: Wedding anniversary falls on May 18 — within stay window. Linked calendar event reads 'Our Day — 9 years with Priya'. Pattern: same travel window observed in 2024 (London stay).
LinkedIn lists affiliation with Sikh community organization in Mumbai. Past stay note at Rosewood London references explicit request for turban stand — confirms observant Sikh practice.
Third Rosewood stay; first visit to Sand Hill property. Consistent annual travel pattern in May aligned with anniversary dates.
Departing Mumbai at 95°F; arriving Menlo Park at 58°F — 37°F climate drop detected. Needs lightweight layering options.

technologyProfile.smartHomeCompatibility: Prefers stable WiFi; brings personal laptop stand and ring light for professional appearance in video calls

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Board-level tech executive. Required secure conference room with NDA protocols. Preferred minimal staff interaction — privacy paramount. All communication via WeChat only.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Business formal every day. Luxury designer brands (Hermès, Gucci, Prada). Evening: designer cocktail dresses.
stayHistory.diningChoices: Two Michelin-starred restaurant visits. Private dining room for meetings.
stayHistory.activities: Art gallery tour (contemporary Chinese). Business meetings morning and afternoon. Private yoga class evening.
stayHistory.techUsage: Brought personal equipment. Worked on MacBook 8+ hours daily. Multiple Zoom calls to international board members.
stayHistory.highlight: Impressed by curated contemporary art walk through the Tai Kwun cultural quarter; requested Sophia for future stays

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Brought personal laptop stand and ring light for video calls. Prefers white noise machine. Enjoyed private tea ceremony arranged by host.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Business casual for day (premium denim with blazer). Evening formal for dining.
stayHistory.diningChoices: Contemporary Chinese fine dining. Private chef experience.
stayHistory.activities: Morning yoga (6:30 AM). Art museum visit. Afternoon strategy sessions. Evening cultural event (Peking Opera).
stayHistory.techUsage: Extended work hours (7 AM–9 PM with video calls to US and Europe). Requested white noise machine during sleep.
stayHistory.highlight: Specifically requested Sophia Santos as primary contact for all future Rosewood stays

upcomingReservation.specialRequests: Secure WiFi for confidential board calls. Dual monitor setup (HDMI). Ring light and stable table for video. Do not disturb between 8 AM–6 PM unless emergency. All communication via WeChat.

signals.detail: Attending Stanford AI Summit — third Silicon Valley visit in 18 months. Likely scouting investment targets.
Linked calendar shows 'Board Prep — Confidential' blocking all three stay days from 8 AM–6 PM.
Executive role suggests significant work commitments. Prefers bring-your-own-device with hotel providing infrastructure only.

attire.formalWear: traditional Japanese dress (kimono) for special occasions
attire.outerwear: natural fiber cardigan or linen jacket

technologyProfile.workRequirements: Minimal connectivity preferred. WiFi available but not required for work.
technologyProfile.smartHomeCompatibility: No smart home devices; prefers analog experience and silence

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Celebrated publication of first book — ceramic-influenced poetry collection. Quiet, introspective traveler. Requested garden-view room. No alcohol; loves matcha. Meditative pace throughout.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Simple, elegant Japanese-inspired clothing. Neutral earth tones. Traditional dress for evening. Comfortable walking shoes.
stayHistory.diningChoices: Vegetable-focused kaiseki dinner. Matcha and pastry at local cafe daily. No formal meals — preferred simple, mindful eating.
stayHistory.activities: 5:30 AM forest walks (daily). Visited local ceramic studios. Ikebana arrangement workshop. Photography of gardens and architecture.
stayHistory.techUsage: Minimal — phone used only for photography. No work-related device usage.
stayHistory.highlight: Deeply moved by hand-written welcome note in Japanese and the private matcha ceremony Riku arranged

upcomingReservation.specialRequests: Garden or nature view room. Quiet location. Minimal housekeeping (exception: fresh flowers daily). Access to morning forest walks or nature paths. Tea ceremony or traditional artisan experience. Photography opportunities. Vegetarian/gluten-free meals.

signals.detail: Instagram features exclusively forest walks, ceramics studio work, and minimalist interiors — strong nature-wellness identity.
Departing Tokyo at 68°F; arriving Miyakojima at similar climate. Light clothing sufficient.
Published poet and ceramic artist. Values introspection, mindfulness, and authentic cultural experiences over convenience.

diningPreferences.specialtyDrinks: Mezcal, tequila, craft cocktails with premium spirits

technologyProfile.workRequirements: Reliable WiFi for video calls to portfolio companies (morning meetings). Bluetooth connectivity for fitness tracking.
technologyProfile.smartHomeCompatibility: HomeKit and Siri voice commands for smart lighting and entertainment

stayHistory.serviceNotes: Venture capitalist hosting portfolio company dinners nightly. Prefers lively, social energy. Excellent wine knowledge — skip elementary pairings. Loves mezcal; arranges his own tequila tastings.
stayHistory.attireObserved: Smart casual daily (designer brands, tailored). Evening: elevated casual for dinners (blazer, premium denim).
stayHistory.diningChoices: Three private dinners hosted. High-end mezcal bar visits. Contemporary Latin American fine dining twice.
stayHistory.activities: Morning cycling rides (5 days, 1.5–2 hours each). Evening social dinners and drinks. Live music venue visit.
stayHistory.techUsage: Used hotel business center for VC calls. Video conferencing with portfolio founders. Shared GoPro footage of cycling routes.
stayHistory.highlight: Raved about curated mezcal flight arranged by James; invited him to guest-lecture at a portfolio founder dinner

upcomingReservation.specialRequests: High-floor room. Late dinner reservations at premium restaurants (farm-to-table preferred). Bicycle rental for morning rides. Craft cocktail bar recommendations. Portfolio company dinner venue coordination assistance. Early evening social hours flexibility.

signals.detail: Attending Sand Hill Road investor summit; multiple back-to-back VC meetings confirmed at hotel and nearby offices.
Two dinner bookings already confirmed via concierge; pre-stay request for best craft cocktail bar in the Peninsula.
Active, social traveler. Values experiences over rest. Early risers (cycling), late nights (social dining).
